global.title: Morning Bid: Central banks take the stage - Reuters
global.summary: Global markets are shifting attention from the Iran ceasefire framework to a pivotal week of central bank decisions, with the Fed and Bank of England expected to hold rates while signaling how war-related inflation risks may evolve.
global.whyItMatters: Economic anxiety shapes family stress, giving pastors insight into the pressures people bring into church life and counseling.

global.title: Oil Selloff Deepens as Iran Deal Spurs Brent’s Fifth Daily Loss - Yahoo Finance
global.summary: Oil prices have fallen for a fifth straight day as traders weigh the expected reopening of the Strait of Hormuz under the Iran deal, though questions remain about how durable the agreement will be.
global.whyItMatters: Lower fuel costs could ease household strain, but the uncertainty is a reminder to pray for peace that is real and lasting, not merely market-deep.

global.title: Flash floods threaten several Southern states - NBC News
global.summary: Severe flash flooding hit parts of the U.S. South, with rescuers working through deep water to reach stranded people and vehicles.
global.whyItMatters: This is a prompt for intercession and a reminder that disaster response and compassionate presence remain central Christian callings.

canadian.title: Chinese-linked hackers targeted US, Canadian research facilities - iTnews
canadian.summary: Google says a Chinese-linked espionage group spent more than a year stealing data from U.S. and Canadian academic, medical, and military research institutions, including work tied to public health and defense.
canadian.whyItMatters: It highlights national vulnerability around research, security, and trust—issues that affect public confidence and the common good pastors speak into.

canadian.title: DyeStat.com - News - Preview: 10 Athletes To Watch At The Canadian Track And Field Championships 2026 - RunnerSpace.com
canadian.summary: Canada’s national track and field championships begin with senior, U20, and para athletes competing together, spotlighting emerging talent and national records.
canadian.whyItMatters: It offers a constructive national story about excellence, perseverance, and the dignity of gifted young people—helpful for encouragement from the pulpit or in community conversation.

persecutedChurch.title: Chinese police swarm church, detain dozens in Sunday morning raid - Newsweek
persecutedChurch.summary: Authorities raided an underground church in China and detained dozens, in what appears to be another step in the ongoing crackdown on unregistered Christian congregations.
persecutedChurch.whyItMatters: Kris may want to lead the church in prayer for courage, protection, and endurance among believers facing direct state pressure.

persecutedChurch.title: Christian leaders hold emergency summit in Jerusalem to confront global rise in antisemitism - Fox News
persecutedChurch.summary: Christian leaders gathered in Jerusalem for an emergency summit focused on responding to rising antisemitism and equipping churches to address biblical confusion and hostility shaped by social media.
persecutedChurch.whyItMatters: It raises discipleship questions about truth, biblical literacy, and how churches form people in a polarized information environment.

leadership.title: When compliance kills trust: The psychological safety blind spot - HR Executive
leadership.summary: This piece argues that more policies and reporting channels do not automatically build trust; without visible fairness, follow-through, and protection for honest voices, silence can deepen.
leadership.whyItMatters: Useful for church leadership: healthy teams need safety, not just rules, if people are going to speak truthfully and serve well.

goodNews.title: Chimp attack survivor turned HS wrestling star surprised by room full of Yankees - MLB.com
goodNews.summary: A young man who survived a devastating childhood chimp attack, underwent many surgeries, and rebuilt his life in the U.S. was honored by the Yankees as he prepares for university.
goodNews.whyItMatters: It is a vivid story of resilience, dignity, and hope—an encouraging reminder of what grace-filled support can help restore.
